summary: Fix runForensic env var passing to use execSync env option instead of shell-style prefix, enabling cross-platform (Windows) support
keyDecisions: Pass env vars via execSync's env option ({ ...process.env, ...env }) instead of shell-style prefix (HOME="value" binary) which fails on Windows

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: runForensic passes env via runCli instead of shell prefix
E2e CLI tests that use env vars pass (TC-CLI-002,003,004,005)

notes: TC-CLI-001 still fails but is a pre-existing binary behavior issue (binary times out instead of printing error when HOME points to nonexistent dir). This is unrelated to the env var passing fix. The env var fix is confirmed working by TC-CLI-002,003,004,005 all passing with HOME env override.
